div.head: The French Ambassador (Jusserand) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Mr. Secretary of State: With special reference to Your Excellency’s note of April 22, last,Not printed. I have, by order of my Government, the honor to inform you that Mr. Parmentier, Director of the General Handling of Funds of the Ministry of Finance, has been commissioned to enter into relations with the American Commission on War Foreign Debts. He will shortly sail for the United States on board La Savoie.
He will be accompanied by Mr. Le Neveu, Secretary of Embassy, assigned for duty at the Ministry of Commerce.

postscript.p: P. S. I should be very thankful to the Department of State if you would kindly direct that the necessary steps be taken to facilitate the landing of these two French citizens sent on a mission to the United States. J.
